itemListElement.reviewBody:
Best school for NIOS studies...
The school fosters a nurturing environment where every student feels valued and supported. The staff is approachable and responsive, always willing to address any concerns promptly. The school also provides excellent resources for mental and emotional well-being, which has been especially important during challenging times.

itemReviewed.name: The Class Of One - Global Online School - Basai,Sector 70

itemListElement.reviewBody:
We were happy earlier but the school has asked us to shift to one to one classes for the coming year as they didn't get enough number of students enrolled it seems. While taking admission last year they have promised us for class room batch sessions. But now they have changed the plans and have given no choice to the parents but to either take one to one or shift the curriculum or leave. Upon talking multiple times to them now they came up with a fee hike of nearly 50% if we want to stay here for the promised group classes. If it is one to one then they don't need to be called as a school but is a tuition. Very much dissatisfied with their responses too. They care less. Pls be cautious if you want to admit your child here, at any moment even in the mid term they might come to you saying they can't proceed further and kids will be stranded. Irony is they mentioned about this change on May 2nd week where many of us had already lost to enroll our kids in other schools as admissiins are already closed. So beware you too will not have much of choice if they do this in middle of term.

Btw the feedback that they give us to fill in will be shown to the teachers and the teaCher will come back to you multiple times discussing why we had given such feedback. So there is no support to parents here. The management will reveal your name to the teachers then why to take feedback is my question?

The Class Of One - Global Online School - Basai,Sector 70

itemListElement.reviewBody: TCO1 is an exceptional online schooling platform that offers kids an opportunity to explore, learn, and achieve a high-quality education. The Admissions Team, notably led by Ms. Nidhi Sabharwal, is incredibly cooperative, standing by students and families at every step.Additionally, the teachers are equally supportive, providing comprehensive assistance to address any queries. Overall, TCO1 is a fantastic online school.

itemReviewed.name: The Class Of One - Global Online School - Basai,Sector 70

itemReviewed.name: The Class Of One - Global Online School - Basai,Sector 70

itemListElement.reviewBody:
Being a mother brings me great satisfaction. My child always has ample opportunities to explore and progress in all aspects. Even though it is an online school, the school has been successful in balancing Academic and Co-Curricular activities. Due to various classroom activities, my daughter Deepika's communication and social skills have greatly improved.
It is important to note that the school management and admissions team, particularly the admissions head, Ms. Nidhi Sabharwal has provided me with a lot of support and guidance in all aspects.

I am grateful to the TCO1 team.

itemReviewed.name: The Class Of One - Global Online School - Basai,Sector 70

itemListElement.reviewBody: The class of one is hands down is one of the best place to work. The entire team is so understanding and supportive especially the Admission team and the Admission Head Ms. Nidhi Sabharwal. They genuinely cares for your growth, both professionally and personally.

Team a greatfull person with a positive energy. Teacher's also are supporting the child with all the possible queries
Fantastic online school!
